summary: The diff implements most of REQ-15 and REQ-16 correctly: an ErrorBoundary component is added and wraps the app root in App.tsx, CDN library globals (pdfjsLib, jspdf, PDFLib, mammoth) are guarded with null checks in all tool components, and index.html loads CDN scripts synchronously before the React module bundle with a matching PDF.js workerSrc. However, REQ-16's requirement for appropriate script loading attributes (defer or async where suitable) is not implemented — all CDN scripts load as plain synchronous blocking scripts with no defer or async attributes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit index.html to ensure all CDN script tags load with appropriate attributes (e.g., defer or async where suitable).
missing_requirements.reason: In the modified index.html, all CDN script tags (PDF.js, jsPDF, pdf-lib, Mammoth.js) are plain synchronous blocking scripts with no defer or async attributes. The AC mentions ensuring appropriate loading attributes are applied where suitable.
